name: DapperDox
description: DapperDox — OSS API documentation generator rendering Swagger/OpenAPI specs with overlays and custom theming.

seo.title: DapperDox — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: DapperDox: DapperDox — OSS API documentation generator rendering Swagger/OpenAPI specs with overlays and custom theming.

when_to_use: Render Swagger/OpenAPI specs as branded docs site
Overlay custom content on top of generated API docs
OSS alternative to hosted API doc platforms
Self-hosted docs with custom theming for partner portal

pros: Overlays let you enrich docs easily
cons: UI feels dated vs modern doc tools
review.verdict: Still usable OSS for OpenAPI docs, but Redocly, Stoplight, or Mintlify deliver a far nicer experience today.
review.best_for: Teams that want free self-hosted OpenAPI docs and can tolerate older UX
review.not_for: Doc-first API companies needing modern polish and active development
